livekitConnectionHint: Check LiveKit reachability and gateway CSP connect-src for the LiveKit WebSocket URL.
missingPatient: No patient context is available for this voice consultation.
tokenServerHint: Check that the token server is running and that gateway CSP allows this endpoint.
voiceConsultationDescription: Start a LiveKit audio room for this patient.
translationFlowDescription: Open a local LiveKit room, then run the doctor-patient translation and OpenMRS draft flow from this workspace.
translationFlowActive: Local AI steps for doctor-patient interpretation and OpenMRS drafting.
doctorSttDetail: Capture clinician speech and produce a local transcript.
translateForPatientDetail: Redact identifiers and translate clinical meaning to the patient language.
patientTtsDetail: Play the translated message using the local TTS voice.
patientSttDetail: Capture patient response and transcribe it locally.
translateForDoctorDetail: Translate the patient response back to the clinician language.
openmrsDraftDetail: Compile an anonymized, clinician-reviewable encounter draft.
draftReadyPreview: Draft ready: chief concern, symptoms, medication mentions, and evidence comments queued for clinician review.
draftPendingPreview: Run the flow to prepare an anonymized draft. Nothing is written to OpenMRS until clinician review.
roundTripTranscriptPreview: Doctor EN -> Patient ES complete. Patient ES -> Doctor EN complete. Redacted transcript is ready for review.
doctorTranslationPreview: Doctor message translated with identifiers redacted. Waiting for patient response.
doctorSttPreview: Doctor transcript captured locally. Translation and TTS are pending.
waitingForAudioPreview: Waiting for local audio capture. Raw audio is not stored by this workspace.
